query: mixed reality brachytherapy applicator placement validation studies

results.title: Mixed Reality in the Operating Room: A Systematic Review.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 39145896. 2024/08/15 00:00. We present a summary of visualisation methods that 
employ these technologies in the medical domain with a diverse range of examples 
presented including diagnostic and exploration, intervention and clinical, 
interaction and gestures, and education.
